calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Fee Request
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Reilly for Marcus Toler (Trustee).

The Fee Request was continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Off the record: Upon further review/consideration, the Court granted the Request for Attorney fees (order for the same signed).

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Or In The Alternstive To Compel Co-Trustee To Perform The Co-Trustee'S Duties.
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Reilly for and with Marcus Toler.

The Court granted the Petition to Remove Co-Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Contreras.

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Or In The Alternstive To Compel Co-Trustee To Perform The Co-Trustee'S Duties.
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Reilly for and with Marcus Taylor.

The Court noted that Daniel Folgal was not present. The Court proposed giving Daniel the opportunity to cooperate with listing of the property. The Petition to Remove Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to September 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court would like Mr. O'Reilly to prepare an order that provides the continued date of the petition, that instructs Daniel to list the property/sign a listing agreement by September 21, 2011 and informs him that if he does not comply the Court will consider his removal as Co-Trustee at the next hearing.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
